activities_projects.title: Transport Efficiency Comparative Study
activities_projects.objective: Evaluate the efficiency of different transport modes for economic development
steps: Select four modes of transport: roadways, railways, waterways and airways
Collect data about cost, speed, cargo capacity and environmental impact
Create a comparative table and identify the most efficient mode for different scenarios
Write a conclusion explaining the role of each mode in national development
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops analytical and evaluative understanding of transport systems
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of analysis and logical justification (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Golden Quadrilateral Economic Impact Study
activities_projects.objective: Analyse how major highway projects influence economic growth
steps: Locate the Golden Quadrilateral and the North–South and East–West corridors on the map
Identify major cities connected by these highways
Study how these highways influence trade, industry and urban growth
Prepare a short report explaining the economic benefits
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands infrastructure development and its economic effects
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of map work and economic reasoning (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Railway Network Distribution Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Investigate the geographical factors affecting railway distribution in India
steps: Identify regions with dense railway networks such as the Northern Plains
Identify regions with sparse railway networks such as the Himalayas and desert areas
Analyse factors such as terrain, population density and economic activity
Prepare a written explanation supported by map references
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops geographical reasoning and spatial analysis skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of explanation and geographical accuracy (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Pipeline Transport Case Study
activities_projects.objective: Understand the strategic importance of pipeline transport in energy distribution
steps: Identify the HVJ (Hazira–Vijaipur–Jagdishpur) pipeline route
List the states connected by this pipeline
Research how pipelines reduce transportation costs and delays
Explain the importance of pipelines for industrial growth
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Learns about modern energy infrastructure systems
activities_projects.evaluation: Research depth and clarity of explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Major Ports Trade Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Analyse the role of sea ports in India's international trade
steps: Locate at least six major ports such as Mumbai, Chennai, Kochi and Vishakhapatnam
Identify the types of goods handled at each port
Explain how ports influence regional economic development
Prepare a report discussing their role in global trade
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops understanding of maritime trade networks
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of analysis and correct examples (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Air Connectivity and Regional Development
activities_projects.objective: Examine the role of air transport in connecting remote regions
steps: Study the importance of airways in mountainous and remote regions
Research the UDAN scheme for regional connectivity
Identify regions where air transport plays a crucial role
Write a case study on how air connectivity supports economic development
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of case study and analysis (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Communication Systems Impact Study
activities_projects.objective: Analyse the role of communication networks in economic and social development
steps: List major communication systems such as postal services, telecom, television and internet
Research the development of India's telecom network
Explain how communication technologies influence business and governance
Present findings in a structured report
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of research and clarity of presentation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: International Trade Pattern Study
activities_projects.objective: Analyse India's export and import patterns
steps: List major export commodities such as gems, jewellery and IT services
List major import commodities such as petroleum and machinery
Analyse how these trade patterns influence India's economy
Explain favourable and unfavourable balance of trade with examples

activities_projects.title: Tourism Development Strategy Project
activities_projects.objective: Design a sustainable tourism plan for a selected region
steps: Select a tourist destination in India
Identify its natural, cultural or historical attractions
Suggest strategies for promoting sustainable tourism
Explain how tourism can generate employment and economic growth
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops planning and critical thinking skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Creativity, feasibility and research depth (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Transport and Communication Policy Review
activities_projects.objective: Critically evaluate the role of transport and communication as lifelines of the economy
steps: Study different transport and communication systems in India
Analyse their role in facilitating trade and economic activities
Identify current challenges such as congestion, infrastructure gaps and environmental impact
Write a critical essay proposing improvements for future development
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops critical thinking and policy analysis skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of critical analysis and originality (10 marks)
